# zabbix_template (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix template by ID or technical name. Exactly one of `id` or `host` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by ID
data "zabbix_template" "by_id" {
  id = "10"
}

# Look up by technical name
data "zabbix_template" "by_host" {
  host = "Linux by Zabbix agent"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host` (String) Technical name of the template. One of `id` or `host` must be set.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the template. One of `id` or `host` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the template.
- `linked_template_ids` (Set of String) Set of template IDs this template links to (inherits from).
- `macros` (Map of String) Map of user macro names to values.
- `name` (String) Visible display name of the template.
- `template_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of template group IDs the template belongs to.
